text: Science has a clearer story about DNA repair pathways than social media does. Our DNA is constantly under attack. From UV rays to pollution, it’s a battleground. But don’t worry! Cells have repair pathways, like a superhero team, fixing the damage. There are several pathways—base excision repair, nucleotide excision repair, and more—each with unique roles. But here’s the twist: not all repairs are perfect. Sometimes, mutations slip through. These mutations can lead to diseases, including cancer. Understanding repair pathways is crucial in medicine. Want to dive deeper into DNA science? Like and follow for more!
